# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment documents generated for the versioned application assessment report. Use the links below to navigate to the available architecture, dependency, API, data, configuration, and workflow references.

## Available Documents

- [Architecture Diagram](architecture-diagram.md) - High-level application layers and detailed component relationships.
- [Dependency Map](dependency-map.md) - Declared production and test dependencies grouped by functional role.
- [API and Service Communication Contracts](api-service-contracts.md) - HTTP endpoints, contract types, and request-flow sequence for the web app.
- [Data Architecture](data-architecture.md) - Persistence model, storage boundaries, and entity-focused data design details.
- [Configuration Inventory](configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, environment-specific settings, and secret handling overview.
- [Business Workflows](business-workflows.md) - Primary user workflows, domain behaviors, and business-rule sequence diagram.
